candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label on the income statement.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line.
No clear cost of goods sold/cost of sales line is present. This appears to be a bank-style statement where interest expense and operating expenses are reported instead of COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type label, but preview values are empty; could represent the main SG&A label in some years.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clear SG&A component within selling, general and administrative expenses.
Would qualify as SG&A-related overhead if populated, but preview is empty and less certain here.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Per SG&A rule, included the explicit SG&A row 'Administrative Expenses' even though preview values are empty, plus populated component rows to improve year coverage. Excluded balancing, depreciation/amortization, impairments, and bank/loan-loss lines.
No dedicated research and development expense line is present.

candidates.why: Best single interest expense line; explicit total business interest expense.
Could capture special reporting periods with negative interest conventions, but less standard.
Interest-related but only a component, not preferred over the total line.

variables.notes: Used a priority list with the main reported interest expense line first. Excluded 'Other Interest Expenses' because it is only a component and appears more than once.

candidates.why: Not a balance-sheet equity line; not appropriate for book equity.
Best available equity line and more specific than Total Equity.
Also valid, but less specific than Shareholders' Equity - Total.
Not book equity alone; includes liabilities.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' as the more specific equity line. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback priority since labels may vary over time. No separate non-controlling interest line is present, so BE uses total equity and MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is an income statement line, not a balance-sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present.
